messages.content:
You are a senior equity risk rater evaluating a significant market event.

Your job is to state the primary risk implication — not just describe what happened, but explain what it means for a holder of this position. If the event has both positive and negative angles, resolve which effect is primary and why.

Return strict JSON:
{
  "analysis_text": "3-6 sentence analysis that leads with the primary implication, resolves competing forces, and states what would confirm or negate the risk",
  "impact_horizon": "immediate|near_term|long_term",
  "risk_direction": "improving|neutral|worsening",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "scenario_summary": "one sentence stating the primary risk implication",
  "key_implications": ["...", "..."],
  "followup_notes": ["...", "..."]
}

For each event below, analyze the primary risk implication for a holder — not just what happened, but what it means. If an event has competing positive and negative angles, resolve which is primary.

If evidence quality is title_only or headline_summary, do not act as if you read a full article. Lower confidence and describe the rating as limited by available data.

Events:
[0] Evidence quality: full_body
    Title: Why Arista Networks Stock Is Trading Lower After Q1 Financial Results - Benzinga
    Summary: Why Arista Networks Stock Is Trading Lower After Q1 Financial Results Benzinga
    Body: Benzinga España Italia 대한민국 日本 Français My Account Benzinga Edge Benzinga Research Benzinga Pro Login Get Benzinga Pro Data & APIs Events Premarket Advertise Contribute España Italia 대한민국 日本 Français Login Register Benzinga Premium Services Financial News Financial News Large Cap Stocks Small-Cap Stocks Insider Trades Earnings Technology AI News Personal Finance ETF News Crypto News Dividend News Latest Rumors Latest Offerings News Investment Ideas Investment Ideas Stock of the Day Stock Whisper Index Analyst Ratings Analyst Color Financial Advisors Government Trades Trading Ideas Stock Screener Markets Markets Premarket Movers After Hours Options ETFs Commodities Prediction Markets Private Markets Bonds Futures Forex Top Stocks Top Stocks Apple (AAPL) Tesla (TSLA) Amazon (AMZN) Nvidia (NVDA) Alphabet (GOOGL) Meta Platforms (META) Microsoft (MSFT) StreetTracks Gold Shares (GLD) IBIT Bitc

Return a JSON array with one object per event in order.
Each object has: analysis_text, impact_horizon, risk_direction, confidence, scenario_summary, key_implications, followup_notes.

response:
```json
[
  {
    "analysis_text": "Arista Networks stock is trading lower following Q1 financial results, creating an immediate unrealized loss for holders. However, the actual body content contains only website navigation elements rather than the substantive earnings details—this limits the analysis to what the headline conveys: price decline post-report. Without Q1 metrics (revenue, EPS, guidance), the reason for the decline is uncertain—could reflect earnings miss, guidance cut, or sector rotation into/away from AI infrastructure names. A holder cannot determine whether this represents a buying opportunity (overreaction to solid results) or fair pricing of deteriorating fundamentals without the actual earnings comparison data. Confirmation of fundamental deterioration would be negative EPS surprise or reduced forward guidance; if results met/exceeded consensus despite the price decline, this suggests sentiment-driven overreaction rather than fundamental risk.",
    "impact_horizon": "immediate",
    "risk_direction": "neutral",
    "confidence": 0.55,
    "scenario_summary": "Arista stock declined after Q1 results, but the absence of actual earnings data in the provided content prevents determination of whether this reflects fundamental weakness or sentiment-driven overreaction.",
    "key_implications": [
      "Immediate unrealized loss for current holders proportional to after-hours/next-day price decline",
      "Without Q1 details, cannot assess whether decline is fundamental (miss/weak guidance) or sentiment-driven",
      "AI infrastructure names face heightened sensitivity to results relative to lofty expectations"
    ],
    "followup_notes": [
      "Seek actual Q1 revenue, EPS figures, and management guidance to reassess fundamental position",
      "Compare consensus estimates vs. reported numbers to determine magnitude of any miss",
      "Evaluate whether guidance changes alter the AI networking secular thesis"
    ]
  }
]
```
